# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

define('TEMPLATE_DIR', __DIR__ . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'templates');

function normalize_page(string $page): string
{
    $page = trim($page);
    $page = str_replace(["\0", "\r", "\n"], '', $page);
    $page = str_replace(['\\'], '/', $page);
    $page = preg_replace('~\s+~', '-', $page);
    $page = preg_replace('~[^a-zA-Z0-9/_-]~', '', $page);
    $page = trim($page, '/');
    return $page !== '' ? $page : 'home';
}

function resolve_template(string $page): ?string
{
    $base = realpath(TEMPLATE_DIR);
    if ($base === false) return null;

    $candidates = [
        $page . '.php',
        $page . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'index.php',
    ];

    foreach ($candidates as $rel) {
        $full = $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $rel;
        $real = realpath($full);
        if ($real !== false && str_starts_with($real, $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($real) && is_readable($real)) {
            return $real;
        }
    }

    $fallback = $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
    $fallbackReal = realpath($fallback);
    if ($fallbackReal !== false && str_starts_with($fallbackReal, $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($fallbackReal) && is_readable($fallbackReal)) {
        return $fallbackReal;
    }

    return null;
}

$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? (string)$_GET['page'] : 'home';
$page = normalize_page($page);

$template = resolve_template($page);

if ($template === null) {
    http_response_code(404);
    header('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8');
    echo "404 Not Found";
    exit;
}

if (basename($template) === '404.php') {
    http_response_code(404);
}

require $template;
